def negative_logging_call_inside_signal_handler_function():
    rule_id = "logging_call_inside_signal_handler_function"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "logging call inside a signal handler; logging uses locks and is not async-signal-safe."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
